Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: main garments for the lower body [300209279], main garments [300209263], clothing [300266639], costume (mode of fashion) [300178802], Costume (hierarchy name) [300209261], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Cloths worn around the loins, often as the sole article of clothing in warm climates.
Paño que se lleva alrededor de las ijadas, con frecuencia cómo único artículo de ropa en los climas cálidos.
Doeken rond de lendenen, in warme klimaten vaak als enige kleding gedragen.
Tuch, das in warmen Klimazonen, vor allem bei Naturvölkern, als einziges Kleidungsstück um die Lenden getragen wird.
Payoh tlen moquechtlalhuilia, nochipa quence ce tlamantli yoyomitl tlen motequihuia quemman tlatotoniya, tlahuel neci ipan altepetzitzin tlen huahcapatl.

Source.Source_ID: 2000046682/Random House Dictionary of the English Language (1987)
